creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
pgj         2010-01-04 09:32:22 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    math                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    math/hs-mwc-random   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This Haskell package contains code for generating high quality random
  numbers that follow either a uniform or normal distribution. The
  generated numbers are suitable for use in statistical applications.
  
  The uniform PRNG uses Marsaglia's MWC256 (also known as MWC8222)
  multiply-with-carry generator, which has a period of 2^8222 and
  fares well in tests of randomness. It is also extremely fast,
  between 2 and 3 times faster than the Mersenne Twister.
  
  WWW: http://darcs.serpentine.com/mwc-random
  
  PR:             ports/142293
  Submitted by:   Jacula Modyun <jacula(at)gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.629     +1 -0      ports/math/Makefile
